overall.description: First-person exploration through a neon-lit cyberpunk city alley at night in a video game. The player walks past vibrant cyan and magenta neon signs, encounters a seated character with a yellow helmet, and approaches a hotel entrance with scattered debris and abandoned furniture.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person walk through a narrow cyberpunk alley at night. The player passes by a glowing cyan neon arrow sign and purple vending machine while pedestrians briefly walk past. The environment features industrial architecture with metal railings, scattered debris, and overgrown weeds.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and circles around a seated character wearing a distinctive yellow helmet. The character remains motionless on the concrete ground while the camera rotates to reveal different angles of the alley, showing industrial piping and distant neon signs.

events.description: distant figures become visible standing near the hotel entrance doors

segments.scene_description: The player walks past the seated character toward a building entrance marked by a pink neon HOTEL sign. An abandoned red couch and cardboard box sit on the right side of the path, while distant figures stand near the entrance doors ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a narrow, neon-lit cyberpunk alley that leads toward the entrance of a desolate hotel. It begins by moving past glowing cyan arrow signs and purple vending machines, weaving through industrial architecture characterized by metal railings and overgrown weeds. As the camera progresses, it slows to circle around a motionless character wearing a distinctive yellow helmet, rotating to reveal the surrounding network of industrial piping and distant neon glows. The movement then resumes, passing the seated figure and gliding toward a pink neon hotel sign. The scene finally opens up to reveal an abandoned red couch and cardboard boxes scattered along the path before approaching distant figures standing by the entrance doors.
